2026-04-22T00:46:16.4578508Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4579380Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4580091Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4580695Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4581433Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4581820Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4582075Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-22T00:46:16.4583024Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-22T00:46:16.4584492Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T00:46:16.4584927Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-22T00:49:01.6435703Z Now I have a clear picture. The 1.1.0 release added `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` (DI/IConfiguration support) and `AnalyzeUsageDetails`/`GetUsage()`. The DI integration is completely undocumented in the README with no sample file — this is the most impactful gap. Let me file the issue.

The new `ContentUnderstandingClient(ContentUnderstandingClientSettings)` constructor introduced in 1.1.0 is not documented anywhere in the README.\n- No sample file (`tests/samples/Sample*.cs` or `samples/Sample*.md`) exists for the `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` / ASP.NET Core DI integration pattern.\n- The `AnalyzeUsageDetails` / `GetUsage()` feature is covered only in `samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md` but is not mentioned in the README's **\"Examples\"** section listing or **\"Key concepts\"** section, making it undiscoverable to readers of the README.\n- The **\"Key concepts\"** / **\"Main classes\"** list does not mention `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**File 1: `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md` — EDIT**\n\nIn the **\"Authenticate the client\"** section (after the API key subsection and before the \"Key concepts\" section), add a new subsection:\n\n```markdown\n#### Using IConfiguration and dependency injection (ASP.NET Core)\n\n\u003e **Note:** This feature is experimental and subject to change. Opt in with `#pragma warning disable SCME0002`.\n\nIf you use ASP.NET Core dependency injection, you can register `ContentUnderstandingClient` using `AddContentUnderstandingClient` and configuration:\n\n```C# Snippet:CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration\n```\n\nIn your `appsettings.json`, add a section for the client settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"ContentUnderstandingClient\": {\n    \"Endpoint\": \"https://your-foundry.services.ai.azure.com/\"\n  }\n}\n```\n```\n\nIn the **\"Main classes\"** list inside **\"Key concepts\"**, add:\n\n```markdown\n* **`ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`** — Settings class that allows creating a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration`, enabling ASP.NET Core dependency injection integration\n```\n\nIn the **\"Examples\"** section, update the list to include:\n\n```markdown\n* **Usage Details** — Retrieve billing and token consumption details after analysis using `GetUsage()` (see `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md`)\n* **Dependency Injection** — Register the client with ASP.NET Core dependency injection using `AddContentUnderstandingClient`\n```\n\n**File 2: `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/tests/samples/SampleDI.cs` — CREATE**\n\nCreate a new sample test file to back the new DI snippet:\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding;\nusing Azure.Core.Extensions;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Azure;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;\n\nnamespace Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.Samples\n{\n    public partial class ContentUnderstandingSamples\n    {\n        // Method kept for snippet extraction only; not run as a live test\n        public void CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration\n#pragma warning disable SCME0002\n            IHostBuilder builder = Host.CreateDefaultBuilder();\n            builder.ConfigureServices((context, services) =\u003e\n            {\n                services.AddAzureClients(clients =\u003e\n                {\n                    // Reads \"ContentUnderstandingClient:Endpoint\" from IConfiguration\n                    // and uses DefaultAzureCredential for authentication\n                    clients.AddContentUnderstandingClient(context.Configuration.GetSection(\"ContentUnderstandingClient\"));\n                });\n            });\n#pragma warning restore SCME0002\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\nThe snippet name **`CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration`** defined in `tests/samples/SampleDI.cs` (via `#region Snippet:CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration` / `#endregion`) needs a corresponding placeholder in the README.\n\n**In `README.md`**, inside the new \"Using IConfiguration and dependency injection\" subsection, insert:\n\n```\n```C# Snippet:CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration\n```\n```\n\n(followed by a closing triple backtick). The `Update-Snippets.ps1` script will fill in the actual code from the test file's `#region` block.\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README already contains all required sections in order:\n1. ✅ Getting started (Install the package, Prerequisites, Authenticate the client)\n2. ✅ Key concepts\n3. ✅ Examples\n4. ✅ Troubleshooting\n5. ✅ Next steps\n6. ✅ Contributing\n\nNo sections are missing; this change adds content within existing sections only.\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun these commands in order:\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 contentunderstanding` — injects the `CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration` snippet into the README placeholder. Check the git diff after running to confirm README was updated correctly.\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 contentunderstanding` — no public API changes in this doc update, but run to confirm no regression.\n5. `dotnet format sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/` — ensures consistent code formatting.\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\n","temporary_id":"aw_cu110docs","title":"[ContentUnderstanding] Docs: Document IConfiguration/DI integration and usage details for 1.1.0"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411280Z server:unified callBackendTool: serverID=safeoutputs, toolName=create_issue, args=map[body:## Documentation Gap
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411287Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411408Z **Package:** `Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding`
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411622Z **Service directory:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411843Z **Triggered by:** commit 6af7db6572976f4b6cc65bb628c45456114e88a0 by @chienyuanchang
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411847Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411926Z ## What Changed
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2411930Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2412167Z The 1.1.0 release (2026-04-21) added two new features to `Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding`:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2412171Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2413568Z 1. **`ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`** — a new `[Experimental("SCME0002")]` class that enables creating a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration` / `IConfigurationSection`, supporting configuration-based credential resolution and ASP.NET Core dependency injection registration via `AddContentUnderstandingClient<TBuilder, TConfiguration>()`.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2414579Z 2. **`AnalyzeUsageDetails`** / **`GetUsage()`** — an extension method on completed analyze operations that surfaces billing and token consumption details (document page counts, contextualization tokens, per-model LLM/embedding token breakdown).
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2414585Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2414666Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2414670Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2415566Z - The README's **"Authenticate the client"** section only shows `DefaultAzureCredential` and `AzureKeyCredential` constructors. The new `ContentUnderstandingClient(ContentUnderstandingClientSettings)` constructor introduced in 1.1.0 is not documented anywhere in the README.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2416060Z - No sample file (`tests/samples/Sample*.cs` or `samples/Sample*.md`) exists for the `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` / ASP.NET Core DI integration pattern.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2416813Z - The `AnalyzeUsageDetails` / `GetUsage()` feature is covered only in `samples/Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md` but is not mentioned in the README's **"Examples"** section listing or **"Key concepts"** section, making it undiscoverable to readers of the README.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417093Z - The **"Key concepts"** / **"Main classes"** list does not mention `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417097Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417172Z <details>
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417390Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417395Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417708Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417712Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417802Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2417807Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418230Z **File 1: `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md` — EDIT**
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418240Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418623Z In the **"Authenticate the client"** section (after the API key subsection and before the "Key concepts" section), add a new subsection:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418630Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418707Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418879Z #### Using IConfiguration and dependency injection (ASP.NET Core)
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2418883Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419176Z > **Note:** This feature is experimental and subject to change. Opt in with `#pragma warning disable SCME0002`.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419179Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419632Z If you use ASP.NET Core dependency injection, you can register `ContentUnderstandingClient` using `AddContentUnderstandingClient` and configuration:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419636Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419816Z ```C# Snippet:CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419890Z ```
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2419893Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420063Z In your `appsettings.json`, add a section for the client settings:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420188Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420268Z ```json
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420342Z {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420441Z   "ContentUnderstandingClient": {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420621Z     "Endpoint": "https://your-foundry.services.ai.azure.com/"
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420690Z   }
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420763Z }
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420827Z ```
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420897Z ```
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2420901Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2421040Z In the **"Main classes"** list inside **"Key concepts"**, add:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2421044Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2421117Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2421845Z * **`ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`** — Settings class that allows creating a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration`, enabling ASP.NET Core dependency injection integration
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2421921Z ```
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2421925Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2422055Z In the **"Examples"** section, update the list to include:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2422068Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2422149Z ```markdown
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2422629Z * **Usage Details** — Retrieve billing and token consumption details after analysis using `GetUsage()` (see `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md`)
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423060Z * **Dependency Injection** — Register the client with ASP.NET Core dependency injection using `AddContentUnderstandingClient`
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423125Z ```
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423130Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423499Z **File 2: `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/tests/samples/SampleDI.cs` — CREATE**
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423504Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423646Z Create a new sample test file to back the new DI snippet:
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423650Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2423903Z ```csharp
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424055Z // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424152Z // Licensed under the MIT License.
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424156Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424229Z using System;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424337Z using Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424443Z using Azure.Core.Extensions;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424539Z using Microsoft.Extensions.Azure;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424658Z using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424791Z using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424891Z using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2424895Z 
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425015Z namespace Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.Samples
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425087Z {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425214Z     public partial class ContentUnderstandingSamples
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425289Z     {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425462Z         // Method kept for snippet extraction only; not run as a live test
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425652Z         public void CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration()
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425725Z         {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2425924Z             #region Snippet:CreateContentUnderstandingClientFromConfiguration
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426151Z #pragma warning disable SCME0002
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426295Z             IHostBuilder builder = Host.CreateDefaultBuilder();
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426438Z             builder.ConfigureServices((context, services) =>
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426508Z             {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426621Z                 services.AddAzureClients(clients =>
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426691Z                 {
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2426886Z                     // Reads "ContentUnderstandingClient:Endpoint" from IConfiguration
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427030Z                     // and uses DefaultAzureCredential for authentication
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427380Z                     clients.AddContentUnderstandingClient(context.Configuration.GetSection("ContentUnderstandingClient"));
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427452Z                 });
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427520Z             });
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427615Z #pragma warning restore SCME0002
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427689Z             #endregion
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427762Z         }
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427829Z     }
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2427903Z }
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2428085Z ```
2026-04-22T00:49:13.2428089Z
